one_time_description: BCFN Gaming revenue received in 2020 with no comparable amount in prior year
economic_notes: Nation is economically dependent on Indigenous Services Canada funding as guaranteed by Treaties under the Indian Act. No approved budget was prepared for the year.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020 not 2024 — the audit report was signed August 26, 2024 but the statements are for year ended March 31, 2020. No education segment expenses appear in the income statement total (Schedule 6 listed in index but not reflected in the five segments totalling 712,446). BCFN Gaming revenue of $246,197 is a significant one-time item with no prior year equivalent. Funds held in trust of $826,845 are Ottawa Trust accounts under the Indian Act and are included in financial assets. Accounts receivable from employees of $120,346 unchanged year-over-year. No schedule of remuneration included. No budget was prepared for the year.
